        "body": "Dear Manager Zhang,\n\nThis is to inform you that the budget review meeting for Q2 department budget allocation will be held this Friday at 2:00 PM.\n\nPlease attend on time.\n\nBest regards,\nLi Ming's colleague\n"
    }
)
print("Status:", response.status_code)
print("Response:", response.text)
